texto: God gave a choice to Adam and Eve to eat the fruit which caused death and pain to all mankind. How is that different than allowing a choice regarding abortion? A person may make the choice to end one life but god allowed a choice that impacts every man, woman and child that has ever been and ever will be. If we strive to follow the image of god how can we outlaw choices and deny the same rights, freedoms and choices that god allowed? We shouldn't determine the choices of others.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de C. L. Ferguson que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “God gave a choice to Adam and Eve to eat the fruit which caused death and pain to all mankind. Ho…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, choice, freedom-of-choice, com foco em luto e termino.
